summary: At-will employment of Jordan Rivera by Northwind Analytics as Senior Data Engineer at a $145,000 annual salary, governed by Washington law.

parties.name: Northwind Analytics, Inc.
parties.evidence_quote: Northwind Analytics, Inc., a Delaware corporation

parties.name: Jordan Rivera
parties.evidence_quote: Jordan Rivera, an individual residing in King County, Washington

key_details.label: Position
key_details.evidence_quote: employs the Employee as Senior Data Engineer

key_details.label: Annual salary
key_details.evidence_quote: annual base salary of one hundred forty-five thousand U.S. dollars (USD $145,000)

key_details.label: Employment type
key_details.value: At-will — either party may terminate at any time
key_details.evidence_quote: meaning that either the Company or the Employee may terminate the employment

key_details.label: IP assignment
key_details.value: Inventions are work made for hire, assigned to the Company
key_details.evidence_quote: shall be “work made for hire” and the exclusive property of the Company

key_details.label: Resignation notice
key_details.evidence_quote: requested, but not required, to provide two (2) weeks

key_details.label: Governing law
key_details.evidence_quote: the laws of the State of Washington
